title: Sarcoglottis rosulata
taxonomy: Sarcoglottis rosulata is a species of orchid. It is classified within the family Orchidaceae. Within this family, Sarcoglottis rosulata is further classified within the subfamily Orchidoideae. This subfamily is a part of the tribe Cranichideae. The species is native to South America.

Research has shown that the plant possesses several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of various conditions such as arthritis and infections.
